bupt.ta.model

类 WorkArrangementItem

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.model.WorkArrangementItem

  • public class WorkArrangementItem
extends java.lang.Object
    One row of work arrangement on an MO job posting. Legacy JSON may only populate duration; new postings use sessionDuration + occurrenceCount.

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      WorkArrangementItem() 
      WorkArrangementItem(java.lang.String workName, java.lang.String sessionDuration, int occurrenceCount, int taCount, java.lang.String specificTime) 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 具体方法 已过时的方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      java.lang.String getDuration()
      已过时。 
      retained for Gson backward compatibility
      int getOccurrenceCount() 
      int getResolvedOccurrenceCount()
      Effective occurrence count (legacy rows with only duration count as 1).
      java.lang.String getResolvedSessionDuration()
      Effective per-session duration for display and derived text.
      java.lang.String getSessionDuration() 
      java.lang.String getSpecificTime() 
      int getTaCount()
